description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a sharply angular, delta-shaped wing configuration and a glossy red and black exterior. The fuselage is compact and streamlined, with a forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit that appears to be single-seat, featuring a dark-tinted canopy. The wings are low-mounted and sharply swept, with integrated weapon-like structures or pods on each side, suggesting a high-performance or combat-oriented design. The rear of the airplane features a single, prominent jet engine with a blue exhaust, and the tail section is minimal, with a low-profile vertical stabilizer. The landing gear is not visibly extended, indicating a possible retractable configuration. The overall design emphasizes speed, agility, and advanced technology, making it stand out in an urban environment.
description: A glossy red and black, delta-winged, futuristic airplane with a forward cockpit, swept low wings, and a single rear jet engine.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharp, angular nose, forward cockpit canopy, and wide, swept wings with side-mounted pods.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the streamlined fuselage, low-mounted swept wing, and visible weapon-like pods under the wing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the single blue-glowing jet engine exhaust and the minimal tail structure.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the aerodynamic profile, swept wing, and rear engine details.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept delta configuration with integrated pods; no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine with visible exhaust.
attribute_tail_design: Minimal tail with a single low-profile vertical stabilizer; no horizontal stabilizers visible.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible; likely retractable configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a dark-tinted canopy.
